title: NLP-018-discuss-techniques-to-reduce-bias-in-nlp-models.原理与应用
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-018 Discuss techniques to reduce bias in NLP models.

 18. Discuss techniques to reduce bias in NLP models.
答案要点:
偏见来源:
- 训练数据不平衡
- 标注偏见
- 历史社会偏见

缓解方法:
1. 数据层面:
   - 数据平衡 (Data Augmentation)
   - Counterfactual Data
2. 训练层面:
   - Adversarial Debiasing
   - Fairness Constraints
3. 后处理:
   - Output Calibration
   - Bias Detection Metrics
4. 评估:
   - StereoSet
   - CrowS-Pairs

质量评分: 94/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

---
